description: Temporary /tmp Lean micro-shards generated from the public-support selector slice emitter and checked with lake env lean under the RSS guard.

notes: The old all-positive one-file slice failed before public classifier supports were exposed.
After public support exposure, the full 16-positive-survivor rank-0 slice checks under the 6.5 GiB cap.
This remains bounded telemetry, not production coverage.
The next production test should emit persistent bounded micro-shards for a multi-rank window, avoiding bad-direction replay.
